---
title: "Curriculum Vitae"
author: "Daria Alexia Ardelean"
date: last-modified
date-format: "MMMM YYYY"
format:
  pdf:
    documentclass: article
    papersize: a4
    pdf-engine: pdflatex
    geometry:
      - top=1in
      - bottom=1in
      - left=1in
      - right=1in
    fontsize: 11pt
    colorlinks: false
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        \usepackage[T1]{fontenc}
        \usepackage{ebgaramond}
        \usepackage{lastpage}
        \usepackage{titlesec}
        \usepackage{marvosym}
        \usepackage{fancyhdr}
        \usepackage{microtype}
        \usepackage{hyperref}
        \hypersetup{hidelinks}
        % Suppress the auto-generated Quarto/Pandoc title block
        \renewcommand{\maketitle}{}
        % ── Page numbers: small, centred in footer ──────────────────────────
        \pagestyle{fancy}
        \fancyhf{}
        \fancyfoot[C]{\footnotesize\thepage\,/\,\pageref{LastPage}}
        \renewcommand{\headrulewidth}{0pt}
        \renewcommand{\footrulewidth}{0pt}
        \fancypagestyle{plain}{\fancyhf{}\fancyfoot[C]{\footnotesize\thepage\,/\,\pageref{LastPage}}%
          \renewcommand{\headrulewidth}{0pt}}
        % ── Section headings: small-caps + bold + rule ───────────────────────
        \titleformat{\section}{\normalsize\bfseries\scshape}{}{0em}{}[\titlerule]
        \titlespacing*{\section}{0pt}{1.5em}{0.7em}
        % ── Global spacing ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
        \setlength{\parindent}{0pt}
        \setlength{\parskip}{0.5em}
---


```{=latex}
\begin{center}
  {\Large\bfseries Daria Alexia Ardelean}\\[0.25em]
  {\small\scshape Curriculum Vitae}\\[0.75em]
  {\small
    \href{mailto:dariaalexia.ardelean@phd.unipd.it}%
         {\Email\enspace dariaalexia.ardelean@phd.unipd.it}%
    \enspace\textbullet\enspace
    \href{https://orcid.org/0009-0009-2583-0362}{ORCID: 0009-0009-2583-0362}%
    \enspace\textbullet\enspace
    \href{https://github.com/dariaalexiaardelean}{GitHub: dariaalexiaardelean}%
  }\\[0.2em]
  {\small Padova, Italy\enspace}
\end{center}
\noindent\rule{\textwidth}{0.4pt}
\vspace{0.2em}
```
I am a clinical psychologist and PhD student interested in clinical neuropsychology and meta-science.

## Current Position

**PhD in Psychological Sciences** — Department of General Psychology, University of Padova\
Nov 2025 – present · Supervisor: Giorgio Arcara

**Galilean PhD fellowship** — Social Sciences Class, Galilean School of Higher Education\
Nov 2025 – present · Class coordinator: Marco Zorzi

## Education and Research Training

**Erasmus+ Traineeship in Non-Invasive Brain Stimulation** — University of Padova, Italy\
Aug 2025 – Nov 2025 · Supervisor: Giulio Contemori\
  - Participant recruitment, scheduling, and data collection for an experiment on visual segregation and integration using transcranial electrical stimulation (tES) and electroencephalography (EEG). Contributed to the multicentre TACS Challenge project, including a research visit to a collaborating laboratory in Rovereto. Tools: MATLAB, RStudio, NIC2.

**Voluntary Internship in Meta-Research** — University of Padova, Italy\
Sep 2024 – Feb 2025 · Supervisor: Ioana Alina Cristea · 6 ECTS\
  - Running meta-analyses in R and working with existing RCT databases.

**Erasmus+ Study in Clinical Neuropsychology and Cognitive Neuroscience** — University of Padova\
Feb 2024 – Feb 2025\
  - Coursework: Individual differences in cognition; Advanced social psychology and social neuroscience; Techniques and methods in psychological assessment (30 cum laude); Clinical neuropsychology; Psychiatry and psychopharmacology (30 cum laude); Neurology; Psychodynamics of family relationships (in Italian).

**MSc, Clinical Psychology and Psychotherapy** — West University of Timișoara\
Sep 2023 – Sep 2025 · 120 ECTS · Final grade: Excellent\
  - Thesis: *Moderators of cognitive interventions for mild cognitive impairment* · Supervisor: Andrei Rusu

**Research Training in Organisational Network Analysis** — West University of Timișoara\
Oct 2022 – Jan 2023\
  - Introductory training in Network Science; project awarded in a local competition. Skills: data cleaning, network analysis methodology, and analysis using Gephi.

**Research Internship in Experimental Psychology** — West University of Timișoara\
Sep 2022 – Jul 2023 · Supervisor: Luca Tisu\
  - Worked with the Work and Organisational Psychology Research Group on the design of a strengths-based intervention for aspiring entrepreneurs and tutored students for the Experimental Psychology course.

**Erasmus+ Study in Psychology** — University of Padova\
Feb 2022 – Jul 2022

**BSc, Psychology** — West University of Timișoara\
Nov 2020 – Jul 2023 · 180 ECTS · Final grade: Excellent\
  - Thesis: *Empowering future entrepreneurs: Testing a strengths-based mindset intervention in a quasi-experimental pilot study*

## Training

**Foundations of network meta-analysis** — Cochrane\
March 2026 · 24 hours · hybrid course

## Teaching

**Integrative Teaching (Didattica Integrativa)** — Statistical Methods for Psychology (Prof. Stefano Noventa)\
2025 - 2026 · 20 hours · University of Padova\
  - Preparation and grading of practical exercises in JASP.
  
**Experimental Psychology Tutor** — Experimental Psychology (Prof. Delia Vîrgă)\
2021 – 2022 · 20 hours · West University of Timișoara\
  - Tutored first-year Psychology students for one semester; graded weekly written assignments and provided feedback.

## Work Experience

**Clinical Psychologist** — Syncare Psychology Clinic, Lugoj, Romania\
Mar 2025 – present\
  - Currently training in psychotherapy. Provided psychological assessment and brief interventions. Registered as clinical psychologist under supervision since May 2024.

**Project Manager** — PROW Conference, Cowork Timișoara, Romania\
May 2021 – Apr 2024\
  - Contributed to building the largest product conference in Western Romania; defined and monitored Objective Key Results; led a team of 10+ people. Worked on national and international projects including Timișoara Startups (project manager), Innovation Labs, and Techstars Startup Weekend Timișoara.

**Project Coordinator** — Association of Sociology and Psychology Students, Timișoara\
Dec 2020 – Aug 2021\
  - Defined and monitored objectives, evaluated coordinators, fundraising and partnerships, organisation of online and on-site public events, and moderation of meetings and workshops.


## Publications

Ardelean, D. A., Tisu, L., & Vîrgă, D. (2025). Empowering future entrepreneurs: Testing a strengths-based mindset intervention in a quasi-experimental pilot study. *Psihologia Resurselor Umane Journal*, 23(1).

## Conferences and Presentations

**Metacognition, Aging and Perception Symposium** — Rovereto, Italy, Sep 2025\
Poster session.

**National Alzheimer Conference** — Bucharest, Romania, Jun 2025\
E-poster session.

## Honours and Awards

**Galilean Fellowship for Doctoral Studies (3 years)** — Scuola Galileiana di Studi Superiori, Social Sciences Class, 2025

## Languages

Romanian (mother tongue) · English (C1) · French (B1) · Italian (A2-B1)

## Skills

Project management · psychological assessment · data analysis · statistics · systematic reviews and meta-analysis · network analysis · experimental psychology · R/RStudio (intermediate) · MATLAB (basic) · Github (intermediate) · VSCode (intermediate) · Quarto (intermediate) · SPSS (proficient) · JASP (proficient) · Jamovi (proficient) · Gephi (intermediate) · MRIcron (basic) · Brainstorm (basic) · EEGLab (basic) · Google Suite (proficient).

```{=latex}
\vspace{2.5em}
\noindent\rule{\textwidth}{0.4pt}\\[0.6em]
{\small Last updated: \today}

\vspace{1.5em}
\noindent\includegraphics[height=2cm]{files/images/Signature.png}\\[0.3em]
\noindent\textit{Daria Alexia Ardelean}
```
